mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username AS author_name FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username AS author_name FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.article_id = #{articleId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL AND c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
SELECT c.*, u.username AS author_name FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.author_id = u.id WHERE c.parent_id = #{parentId} AND c.is_active = 1 ORDER BY c.created_at ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (article_id, author_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (#{articleId}, #{authorId}, #{content}, #{parentId})
